description: RGPD Art.4 PII redaction — CAB-1114 Phase 2 (patterns from control-plane-api/src/core/pii/patterns.py)

remove.description: Strip payloads for successful responses (2xx/3xx) — RGPD: no payload stored on success

script.description: Redact PII from error payloads (4xx/5xx) — 7 pattern types
script.source: def redactedFields = new ArrayList(); for (def f : ['request_body', 'response_body', 'error_message']) { if (ctx.containsKey(f) && ctx[f] != null) { def text = ctx[f].toString(); def original = text; text = /eyJ[A-Za-z0-9_-]*\.eyJ[A-Za-z0-9_-]*\.[A-Za-z0-9_-]*/.matcher(text).replaceAll('[TOKEN:REDACTED]'); text = /\b[A-Z]{2}\d{2}[A-Z0-9]{4,30}\b/.matcher(text).replaceAll('[IBAN:REDACTED]'); text = /\b(?:4\d{12}(?:\d{3})?|5[1-5]\d{14}|3[47]\d{13})\b/.matcher(text).replaceAll('[CARD:REDACTED]'); text = /\b[12]\d{2}(?:0[1-9]|1[0-2])\d{5}\d{3}(?:\s?\d{2})?\b/.matcher(text).replaceAll('[SSN:REDACTED]'); text = /\b(?:sk|pk|api|key|token|secret)[-_]?[A-Za-z0-9]{16,}\b/.matcher(text).replaceAll('[APIKEY:REDACTED]'); text = /\b[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,}\b/.matcher(text).replaceAll('[EMAIL:REDACTED]'); text = /(?:\+33|0033|0)[1-9](?:[\s.-]?\d{2}){4}/.matcher(text).replaceAll('[PHONE:REDACTED]'); if (!text.equals(original)) { redactedFields.add(f); } ctx[f] = text; } } ctx.rgpd_redacted = redactedFields.size() > 0; ctx.rgpd_redacted_fields = redactedFields;

set.description: Initialize RGPD audit fields for non-error responses
